      "text": "11. Un ar Absalomu gahje di-

"

      "n": 12,

      "text": "12. Absaloms fuhttija arridsan

Dahwida Padohma-Deiveju/ no
tawa Pilsfahta Gilus atwest/
zeekams tas Uppurus uppureja/
un ta Derriba stiprinajahs / un

"

    {

      "text": "13. Tad nahze weens Wehste-

"

      "n": 14,

mi pahr mums/un kauj to Pils-

"

    {

"

    {
      "n": 16,

"

    {
      "n": 17,

      "text": "17. Kad nu tas Kehnisch ar

"

      "n": 19,

      "text": "19. Tad fazzija tas Kehninsc

"

    {

Schehlastiba un Peetizziba lai a-

"

    {
      "n": 21,
